SEARCH

Class Movie

java.lang.Object
Movie
public class Movie extends Object
Represents one movie record in the Movie Tracker DMS. A Movie stores the identifying, descriptive, and numeric data used by the application for CRUD operations, display output, validation, and calculations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Movie(int movieId, String title, String genre, int releaseYear, int runtimeMinutes, double rating, boolean watched)
    Creates a movie record with all values needed by the DMS.

    boolean

    Updates the movie ID when the supplied value is positive.

    Updates the rating when the supplied value is between 0.0 and 10.0.

    Updates the release year when it falls within the accepted range.

    Converts this movie to the pipe-delimited format used by text storage.

    Builds a readable string representation of this movie.

    Formats this movie as one row for text-based table output.

  • Constructor Details

    • Movie

      public Movie(int movieId, String title, String genre, int releaseYear, int runtimeMinutes, double rating, boolean watched)
      Creates a movie record with all values needed by the DMS.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the unique ID for the movie
      title - the movie title
      genre - the movie genre
      releaseYear - the year the movie was released
      runtimeMinutes - the movie runtime in minutes
      rating - the user's rating from 0.0 to 10.0
      watched - true if the movie has been watched, false otherwise

  • Method Details

    • getMovieId

      public int getMovieId()
      Returns the movie's unique ID.
      Returns:
      the movie ID

    • setMovieId

      public boolean setMovieId(int movieId)
      Updates the movie ID when the supplied value is positive.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the new movie ID
      Returns:
      true if the ID was updated, false if the value was invalid

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns the movie title.
      Returns:
      the title of the movie

    • setTitle

      public boolean setTitle(String title)
      Updates the movie title when the supplied value is not blank.
      Parameters:
      title - the new title value
      Returns:
      true if the title was updated, false if the value was blank

    • getGenre

      public String getGenre()
      Returns the movie genre.
      Returns:
      the genre of the movie

    • setGenre

      public boolean setGenre(String genre)
      Updates the movie genre when the supplied value is not blank.
      Parameters:
      genre - the new genre value
      Returns:
      true if the genre was updated, false if the value was blank

    • getReleaseYear

      public int getReleaseYear()
      Returns the movie release year.
      Returns:
      the release year

    • setReleaseYear

      public boolean setReleaseYear(int releaseYear)
      Updates the release year when it falls within the accepted range.
      Parameters:
      releaseYear - the new release year
      Returns:
      true if the year was updated, false if the value was invalid

    • getRuntimeMinutes

      public int getRuntimeMinutes()
      Returns the movie runtime in minutes.
      Returns:
      the runtime in minutes

    • setRuntimeMinutes

      public boolean setRuntimeMinutes(int runtimeMinutes)
      Updates the runtime when the supplied value is positive.
      Parameters:
      runtimeMinutes - the new runtime in minutes
      Returns:
      true if the runtime was updated, false if the value was invalid

    • getRating

      public double getRating()
      Returns the user rating for the movie.
      Returns:
      the movie rating from 0.0 to 10.0

    • setRating

      public boolean setRating(double rating)
      Updates the rating when the supplied value is between 0.0 and 10.0.
      Parameters:
      rating - the new movie rating
      Returns:
      true if the rating was updated, false if the value was invalid

    • isWatched

      public boolean isWatched()
      Returns whether the movie has been watched.
      Returns:
      true if watched, false otherwise

    • setWatched

      public boolean setWatched(boolean watched)
      Updates the watched status for the movie.
      Parameters:
      watched - the new watched status
      Returns:
      true after the watched status is updated

    • copy

      public Movie copy()
      Creates a separate Movie object with the same field values. This supports safe sharing of movie records without exposing the original object.
      Returns:
      a copy of this movie

    • toTableRow

      public String toTableRow()
      Formats this movie as one row for text-based table output.
      Returns:
      a formatted table row containing this movie's values

    • toFileLine

      public String toFileLine()
      Converts this movie to the pipe-delimited format used by text storage.
      Returns:
      a pipe-delimited line representing this movie

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Builds a readable string representation of this movie.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string containing the movie field values
